Hello guys. Morning. Hey everybody. Sounds like everybody is pretty enthused this morning. Gosh, you just made 900 bucks in two days and that's all you hear out of you? Isn't this fun stuff? I just need to get on the phone man. Okay guys, I'm going to talk a little bit about the blast. How things go yesterday on the introduction? Did everybody take some things away from that? Did you work on it when you went out on the phone? Oh yeah, absolutely. Give me some feedback of how the introduction, knowing what you know now helped you yesterday, your training yesterday. Just the information they give you, like in the first two, three minutes they're telling you pretty much everything about them. It gives you so much information to work on. So the lady that we just sold, why in the first three minutes, what did you figure out, why was she a deal? She pretty much told me she was. I mean, she said her New Year's resolution. She wants an online business successful to buy her a new home and to an adopted child. She already has an online webpage but what she was telling me is how many figures she wanted. She needed the help, the coaching on to make an online successful business. She gave me pretty much every detail of what she needed out of an online business and that's how we could help. So when you went through that and you figured out that she has good goals and she's the type of person that we maybe would consider working with, then what did you do? Well, honestly, I just went straight down the script. So you figured out in the introduction that you had somebody that was a good candidate for what we have to offer, right? Yeah. Now at that point it's important to have a good blast, right? Right. You know, really why you guys are on the phone. Right. Because you just can't introduce yourself, she doesn't understand really what it is that we have to offer to provide her with the solution that she asked for in the introduction. Okay, so the power in the blast, and the whole purpose of the blast is to position yourself to where that person will go more into detail about where they're at and what it is that they're looking to do. So you get to know where that person is financially, what type of goals they have personally, really what it is that they want out of life. And to get somebody to tell you that, it's very important to build the value, to create excitement. And when I say that, to create excitement, the question that I always ask myself going into a blast is why people buy. And I ask, and it's different for everybody. Every single person in here buys for a different reason. Nobody likes to be sold, all of us want to buy something. So when you're doing your blast, you're not trying to sell anything. You're trying to present an opportunity that we have. So the question of why people buy and being able to figure out why people buy is going to come when you get into the probe. But the way that you get into an effective probe is to understand that they need to see the value in what it is that we're going to do for them. They need to see a solution for what that person is looking for. And so when you do your introduction, it's a chance for you to get to know the person a little bit. When it's time to do the blast, that's when I like to stand up. Because sometimes people will kind of, I guess, when you get to the blast, it's an opportunity for you to get a little bit excited. Because you're passionate about what we do. And now I'm going to tell you about what we do because I know that you have good goals, you have a couple websites up, you're trading time for money, you got a kid, you're looking for different things, a different avenue in life. And so I know that I need to help you understand that what we have is the solution. Because I know you lack the knowledge, I know that you understand that you don't know what to do to get to where you need to be. What I need you to understand is that you need to believe that I have the solution for you. The solution is different for everybody. So when you go through the blast, remember the purpose of your blast is to create that excitement so that as soon as I get done and prepare that person to know that I'm going to get to know you. And by doing a good blast and creating that excitement and helping that person understand that we're going to provide them with coaching. We're going to provide them with all the tools that they need. We're going to provide them with the opportunity to make the type of money that they need to make to achieve their goals. That's the purpose of your blast. Now when somebody knows that, they understand that they're in a position that if we extend an opportunity for them to help them, then we have that solution. What do people love to do? They love to buy. But who likes to be sold? Nobody. So we don't care if we work with that one person or not, but we want them to understand that if they work with us, we have the solution for them. So when you have that solution, if you see a little, itty-bitty chance, Robbie, that this business can get you to be able to do everything, all these things that are important to you, if you just have that much of a chance, are you going to tell me where you're at? You're going to give them all the information they need. That excitement is going to be created. The whole psychology behind the way that we do the script is you find out about them, you find out about what they want to do, what they want to accomplish, why they haven't been able to do that, you find that in the introduction, and then all of a sudden we slip in a solution. And the solution is we've got coaching, we've got the know-how to help you to achieve those things. If I can help somebody to be able to stay home with their kids, because they want to be a stay-at-home mom, and there's just an ounce of hope that they might be able to get there, and that we can help them to get there, all of a sudden getting through the probe becomes very, very easy, and getting through money and finding out how much they have available on their credit becomes very easy, because I'm helping them to achieve their goals. And that makes it very, very simple, very, very easy. But the whole psychology, the script, the reason it's set up, the way that it's set up, is because you've got to go through that process, and that process you've got to go through it every single time, with every single person. And that excitement that you create, Randy says he stands up when he starts going through the blast. That's because he wants to create that excitement. Not only does he get excited, but that excitement, it'll transfer over to the person on the other end of the phone, they'll get excited. And then all of a sudden them getting excited about having a way to get out of the rut that they're in, the rat race that they're in, makes it very, very simple, very easy for them to get out of that. So if we create that excitement, and now I have the person they understand, I have the solution, are you going to tell me where you're at financially? If you see that I can help you? Absolutely. I'm not here to hurt you yet. And that's what these people, first thing when you get on the phone with them, they're like this. Just like this. And until you can break that guard, and build that value in what it is, the reason why you're on the phone, they're not going to put them down. And so to get them to put their hands down, you've got to give them that blast of emotion. You've got to give them that little bit of belief that we can provide them with what it is that they're looking for. And if you have that, then when you go in and I ask you where you're at with your credit, or personal questions that we ask in the pro, then we know at that point that they're going to answer our questions. And why are they going to answer them? Because I've created that excitement. Because if I don't create that excitement, are you going to tell me where you're at on your cards? If I just go right through it and just, and then I get down to the question, oh, ran into the question about credit. Uh-oh. Here we go. But if I build that excitement, and build that value, and have that bond with this person, that in trust we can provide them with that solution, they're going to tell me. And when you have those things, when I know that you're $30,000 in credit card debt, and that your wife lost her job, and that you're working, you know, trading time for money, and you want to put your kids in private school, and you have all these things that are important to you, when you tell me all these things, and I give it to a closer, and I know all these important things that are important to that person. Why that one person would buy, and I hand it to a different person, and they talk to it, you know, a closer director, and they get on the phone with this person, and you've built that excitement, you know what it is that they're looking to do. A closer is going to close 90% of those. Okay? So if you do a good job at an introduction, creating yourself in a trap, what we call an attractive character, not being that other guy that just called them two weeks ago that went through the script and they got off the phone, but being that guy that they've never heard, that different guy. Something about you, something about all of you guys in your own way is attractive. You all have good qualities in your own different ways. So be attractive. Have fun with these people. Like you were yesterday, Bill. You know, if you get a chance and you want to get off script a little bit, I learned this from Garrett. He's a wise man. This is the script. Your objective is to get from point A to point B as quickly as possible. Right through it. You know, the questions that you need to ask, you know, the objectives that you need, and that's what you want to do. Now, in the beginning here, or maybe even a little later, if you get off a little bit, like you did, Bill, you start talking, you get a guy on the phone that's an Irish guy, I'm Irish too, and you get that guy laughing, because how important is it to have that, to have somebody on the other end of the line that's laughing with you? Very. It's everything. If I can get somebody to laugh with me, I can get them, I'm here. And if I can get here, it's easy for them to go here. But I can't reach their wallet, but I can get into their heart like you were, and you get personal with them. That's fine. But remember, that's not what you're here to do. So you do that, that's fine. Build that, create that excitement, but then get back on track and get through the script. That's it. Any questions? Alright, that was good. Create that excitement in your blast, guys. That excitement, you create that excitement, and then tie that back in to solving their problem, and the problems that they have, will make all the difference in the world for you. What do you get? Why people buy it. People buy it because they're excited because you have something that can help them out. Okay. Alright. Thanks, guys.
